[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010100101 5
1 0001010111 5
2 1010110011 6
3 0011011110 6
4 1010110011 6
5 0011001110 5
6 0111010010 5
7 0010100010 3

01 0101010000 3
12 0010100010 3 match 7
23 1000000000 1
34 0001010110 4
45 1010100001 4
56 0001000000 1
67 1000110001 4
70 0000001100 2

02 0111010010 5 match 6
13 0010100000 2
24 0000000100 1
35 0000000111 3
46 0000000000 a
57 0000010000 1
60 1000100001 3
71 0001001100 3

03 0110000000 2
14 0000000010 1
25 1000000101 3
36 0001000100 2
47 1000100001 3
50 0000000000 a
61 1000010001 3
72 0011001010 4

04 0101010010 4
15 0010100010 3 match 7

37 0000010001 2
40 1000100001 3
